news.t: Look Under The Hood: The iShares Morningstar Large-Cap Growth ETF Has 10% Upside
Peek Under The Hood: The iShares Morningstar Large-Cap Growth ETF Has 12% Upside
Sum Up The Parts: The iShares Morningstar Large-Cap Growth ETF Could Be Worth $200

holdings.infoBox: ILCG is an equity ETF with a total of 332 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.98%, Apple at 6.54%, Broadcom at 5.51%, Amazon.com at 4.93%, and Alphabet at 4.47%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Growth ETF (ILCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of growth stocks, selected from the top 90% of the US market-cap spectrum. ILCG was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar US Large-Mid Cap Broad Growth Index Gross
